steps.expression: async () => { const first = await window.api.agents.list({ viewKind: 'agentsList', searchText: '', tagFilter: '', sortBy: 'updatedAt', sortDirection: 'desc', page: 1 }); if (!first.ok) { return { ok: false, error: first.error }; } const invalid = first.value.items.filter((agent) => agent.invalidConfig).map((agent) => ({ id: agent.id, name: agent.name, modelRefOrNull: agent.modelRefOrNull })); return { ok: true, total: first.value.total, invalidCount: invalid.length, invalid }; }
